properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: The timeless theme, Earth and Heaven will pass away. It’s not a dream, God will make all things new that day. Gone is the curse from which I stumbled and fell. Evil is banished to eternal hell.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No more night. No more pain. No more tears. Never crying again. And praises to the great "I AM." We will live in the light of the risen Lamb.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: See all around, now the nations bow down to sing. The only sound is the praises to Christ, our King. Slowly the names from the book are read. I know the King, so there’s no need to dread.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: See over there, there’s a mansion, Oh, that’s prepared just for me, Where I will live With my savior eternally.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All praises to the great "I AM." We’re gonna live in the light of the risen Lamb.
